# Birch House — Fort Lauderdale Beach
# https://birchhouseclub.com

## About
Birch House is a luxury boutique hotel on Fort Lauderdale Beach, Florida.
It has five suites: three Junior Suites (525 sq ft) and two One-Bedroom Suites (1,150 sq ft).
Created by the same ownership and many of the same long-standing staff as The Pillars Hotel & Club,
carrying forward the spirit of personal service and understated elegance.

Address: 66 S Birch Road, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33316
Phone: +1 (954) 467-9639
Email: guestservices@birchhouseclub.com
Check-in: 3:00 PM | Check-out: 11:00 AM
Price range: $$$
Pets: Contact for details
Parking: On-site

## Suites
- Junior Suite (x3): 525 sq ft. ADA-accessible option available.
- One-Bedroom Suite (x2): 1,150 sq ft. Separate living room, generous bedroom.

## Amenities
- Heated outdoor pool
- Steps from Fort Lauderdale Beach (Atlantic Ocean)
- Near Fort Lauderdale Intracoastal Waterway and marina
- 15 minutes from Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport (FLL)
